text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to understand and interpret visual information from the world. It involves tasks such as image recognition, where a computer identifies objects or people in a photo, and object detection, which locates and labels multiple items within an image. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, self-driving cars use computer vision to recognise traffic signs, pedestrians, and other vehicles, helping them navigate safely. Other uses include medical imaging, security surveillance, and sorting products in warehouses. As technology improves, computer vision continues to transform how machines interact with their environment.
